title: BumbleGrid Spec Document
description: A Bumble Grid Specification document. Defines a multi-floor graph that maps a company's infrastructure, features, and business workflows across increasing levels of abstraction. Floor 0 is the physical/logical infrastructure layer. Higher floors (1+) are reserved for future specification.

bgspec.description: BGSpec format version. Used by consumers to select the correct parser and validator.

document.description: Metadata about this BGSpec document itself — not about any single floor or node.

company.description: Name of the organization this document describes.

updatedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last modification, by a human or extractor pipeline.

description.description: Optional free-text summary of scope and context.

authors.description: People or systems responsible for maintaining this document.

tags.description: Arbitrary string tags for search and categorisation.

styleMap.description:
HUMAN-OWNED. Canonical store for all rendering overrides that must survive automated re-extraction.

Ownership rules:
  - Extractors MUST NOT read or write this block.
  - Version control diffs on 'floors' reflect only structural/infra changes.
  - Diffs on 'styleMap' reflect only intentional visual decisions.

Resolution order (later entries win, same as CSS specificity):
  1. styleMap.global        — applies to every node/edge in the document
  2. styleMap.byFloor[n]    — applies to every node/edge on floor n
  3. styleMap.byTag         — applies when data.meta.tags matches a key/value pair (see 'byTag')
  4. styleMap.byId["<id>"]  — applies to the single node or edge with that id

At render time, a consumer merges these layers, then applies any
inline 'style' field present on the node/edge itself (highest priority).
Inline 'style' is an escape hatch; prefer 'styleMap.byId' for anything
that should persist across re-extractions.

global.description: Style rules applied to ALL nodes and ALL edges in this document. Useful for setting a consistent font, default node color, or default edge line style for the entire map.

byFloor.description: Style rules keyed by floor number (as a string, e.g. "0", "1"). Applied to every node and edge on that floor. Overrides 'global'.

byTag.description: Style rules keyed by meta.tags key/value pairs. Each property is a tag key (same string as in data.meta.tags on Floor 0 nodes). Its value is an object mapping tag values to styleRules — e.g. "env": { "prod": { ... } } matches meta.tags.env === "prod". Applies to every node or edge on any floor whose data.meta.tags defines that key with that value (string equality). When multiple pairs match, consumers SHOULD merge matching blocks in a stable documented order. Overrides 'global' and 'byFloor'. Overridden by 'byId'.

byId.description: Style rules keyed by node or edge 'id'. Targets a single element. Overrides 'global', 'byFloor', and 'byTag'. Use this for per-node color, position, or border overrides that should survive re-extraction.

floors.description: Ordered array of floors, from Floor 0 upward. At least two floors are required.

styleRules.description:
A portable set of rendering hints. When applied via 'styleMap', these rules target the node or edge matched by the parent key (global / byFloor / byTag / byId). When applied inline on a node or edge, they target that element only.

All fields are optional. Renderers provide sensible defaults per bgKind and bgRelation.

node.description: Rules that apply only to nodes. Ignored when this styleRules block is resolved against an edge.

borderWidth.description: Node outline width in renderer units.

icon.description: Icon identifier or URL. Renderers resolve this to an image asset.

opacity.description: Node opacity. 0 = fully transparent, 1 = fully opaque.

width.description: Node width in renderer units. If absent, renderer auto-sizes.

height.description: Node height in renderer units. If absent, renderer auto-sizes.

position.description:
Fixed canvas position for this node. When set, the renderer pins the node and skips auto-layout for it. If absent, the renderer places the node automatically.

NOTE: 'position' is intentionally housed in 'styleMap.byId' rather than in the node's data envelope, because position is a rendering decision, not an infrastructure fact. Keeping it here ensures the extractor cannot accidentally overwrite a carefully placed node.

edge.description: Rules that apply only to edges. Ignored when this styleRules block is resolved against a node.

width.description: Edge line width in renderer units.

targetArrowShape.description: Arrow shape at the target end.

sourceArrowShape.description: Arrow shape at the source end. Useful for bidirectional edges.

opacity.description: Edge opacity. 0 = fully transparent, 1 = fully opaque.

labelColor.description: Color of the edge label text.

floor.description: Floor number. 0 = Physical/Logical. Must be unique, contiguous, starting at 0.

label.description: Short human-readable name for this abstraction layer.

description.description: What this floor represents, what kinds of nodes live here, and how it relates to adjacent floors.

nodes.description: All nodes at this floor. For Floor 0, each item must conform to the BGSpec Floor 0 Node schema.

edges.description: All edges at this floor. For Floor 0, each item must conform to the BGSpec Floor 0 Edge schema.

document.title: Payments Domain — Infrastructure Map
document.description: Floor 0 infrastructure graph for the Payments domain.

floors.label: Infrastructure
floors.description: Physical and logical infrastructure layer. Nodes are Kubernetes resources.

meta.description: Payments API calls Identity API to validate JWT tokens on every request.
